title: Tangy Creamy Spanish Steak Stir-fry
description: A tangy and creamy blend of fillet of steak with blanched vegetables in a savory sauce, designed as an easy hangover-cure dish for breakfast.
instructions: Preheat the grill or a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Grill the steak fillet for about 5 minutes on each side, until desired doneness is achieved. Let it rest while preparing the vegetables and sauce.
In a small bowl, mix together peanut butter, soy sauce, salt, and pepper to make the tangy creamy sauce.
Meanwhile, in another pan, sauté the sliced bell peppers and chopped onion over medium heat for about 5 minutes or until they start to soften.

Add minced garlic to the pan with vegetables; cook for an additional minute. Pour in the sauce and stir well until it thickens slightly, then add the blanched green peas (if using) and spinach (if using).
Slice the rested steak into strips and mix them evenly into the vegetable-cream sauce.
Transfer the dish onto serving plates; garnish with cilantro leaves. Serve immediately while hot.
